log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Metallic Dragonborn — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14

→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Metallic Dragonborn — Winged Striker HP: 48/67
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Metallic Dragonborn — Winged Striker HP: 32/67
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 8 damage. Metallic Dragonborn — Winged Striker HP: 24/67
--- Metallic Dragonborn — Winged Striker --- HP: 24/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
